indication: RITUXAN (rituximab for injection) is indicated for the treatment of patients with CD20 positive, diffuse large B-cell non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma (DLBCL) in combination with CHOP (cyclophosphamide, doxorubicin, vincristine, and prednisone) chemotherapy.
description: Health Canada approved rituximab for the treatment of patients with CD20 positive, diffuse large B-cell non-Hodgkin’s lymphoma (DLBCL) in combination with CHOP chemotherapy.

document.name: Rituxan (rituximab) [product monograph]. HC.
document.description: Hoffmann-La Roche Limited. Rituxan (rituximab) [product monograph]. Health Canada website. https://pdf.hres.ca/dpd_pm/00071131.PDF. Revised June 2023. Accessed June 2025.
